steps.title: Complete the cost logic
steps.content: The text explains that astronauts have had to repair Hubble and that robots would be helpful because using astronauts for maintenance is expensive. The blank must describe depending on astronauts for that work.

steps.title: Reject incoherent verbs
steps.content: A would mean physically aligning astronauts, which does not fit. B reverses the idea by suggesting neglecting astronauts. D does not idiomatically describe the maintenance relationship. The remaining phrase means depending on astronauts. The answer is C.
